prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约12735名→16458名→21260名→23889名→25061名，呈持续后移趋势，近5年累计后移约12326名，年均后移约2465名；2025年基准位次约25061名；该校在山东省招生计划2021年126人、2022年130人、2023年130人、2024年132人、2025年139人；2026年计划 137人，较2025年缩招2人（约-1.44%），缩招幅度较小，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京交通大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第41名 ，近年排名稳定在40–43名区间，属于全国顶尖211高校行列；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及实验室爆炸火灾事故，可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制 作用；抖音热度为较热（总排名第45位），综合热度约93.5万，短视频平台关注度处于中等偏上水平；近5年无显著投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，系统科 学获评A+（全国顶尖），交通运输工程、信息与通信工程获评A，计算机科学与技术、土木工程、管理科学与工程获评A-；共6个A-及以上学科，其中系统科学、交通运输工程、信 息与通信工程等与招生专业高度关联，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等该校核心招生专业大类社会热度持续偏高 （2024年均为高热推荐），对考生吸引力强；山东省2026年高考报名总数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约3.9万人（+5.7%），考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；省控线（普通类 一段）近年稳定在441–444分区间，无明显波动；北京交通大学位于北京市，对山东省考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在山东省招生计划占比较大（2025年139人 ，为京外主要生源省份之一），跨省报考热度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅缩招（-2人）、山东省考生总数显著增加（+3.9万）以及 学校优势学科吸引力强等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧。其中考生规模扩大是推动位次后移的最关键因素，缩招幅度较小影响有限，声誉偏负面有轻微抑制作用但不足 以扭转整体趋势。预测2026年最低录取位次约25045名，波动区间24545–25545名。

- 理科试验班类（詹天佑试点班智能类）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间24545–25545名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向，一档专业可作为冲刺目标（需位次明显优于区间上限），三档专业作为稳妥保底。该校计算机类、电子信息 类、交通运输类等优势学科专业报考热度高，竞争激烈，考生应结合自身位次合理定位。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Comprehensive category in Shandong Province were approximately 12735 → 16458 → 21260 → 23889 → 25061, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 12326 places over the past 5 years, averaging about 2465 places per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 25061; the university's enrollment plan in Shandong Province was 126 in 2021, 130 in 2022, 130 in 2023, 132 in 2024, and 139 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 137, a reduction of 2 students compared to 2025 (about -1.44%), a relatively small reduction with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 41st, with stable rankings in the 40–43 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving a laboratory explosion and fire accident, which may have a mild inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity is relatively high (overall ranking 45th), with comprehensive popularity of about 935,000, and short video platform attention is at an upper-middle level; there have been no significant admission gaps in the past 5 years; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Systems Science was rated A+ (national top), Transportation Engineering, Information and Communication Engineering were rated A, Computer Science and Technology, Civil Engineering, Management Science and Engineering were rated A-; a total of 6 disciplines at A- or above, among which Systems Science, Transportation Engineering, Information and Communication Engineering are highly related to the enrollment majors, exerting strong attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other core enrollment major categories of the university have consistently high social popularity (all were highly recommended in 2024), strongly attracting candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 compared to 2025's about 681,000 (+5.7%), with the expansion of candidate scale intensifying overall competition; the provincial control line (General Category First Segment) has been stable in the 441–444 score range in recent years, with no significant fluctuations; Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, exerting strong regional attraction for Shandong candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Shandong Province accounts for a relatively large proportion (139 in 2025, one of the main source provinces outside Beijing), with high cross-province application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, a slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-2 students), a significant increase in the total number of candidates in Shandong Province (+39,000), and the strong attraction of the university's advantageous disciplines, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025. Among these, the expansion of candidate scale is the most critical factor driving the backward shift of rankings, the reduction in enrollment is small with limited impact, and the slightly negative reputation has a mild inhibitory effect but is insufficient to reverse the overall trend. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be about 25045, with a fluctuation range of 24545–25545.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 24545–25545, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, Tier 1 majors can be used as sprint targets (requiring rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range), and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. The university's advantageous disciplines such as Computer, Electronic Information, and Transportation have high application popularity and intense competition; candidates should position themselves reasonably based on their own rankings.
